member.name: T:Aspire.StackExchange.Redis.AspireRedisClientBuilder
member.summary: Provides a builder for configuring Redis client services using StackExchange.Redis in an Aspire application.
member.param: The with which services are being registered.
The to configure the Redis client.
The service key used to register the service, if any.

member.name: M:Aspire.StackExchange.Redis.AspireRedisClientBuilder.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,Aspire.StackExchange.Redis.StackExchangeRedisSettings,System.String)
member.summary: Provides a builder for configuring Redis client services using StackExchange.Redis in an Aspire application.
member.param: The with which services are being registered.
The to configure the Redis client.
The service key used to register the service, if any.

member.name: P:Aspire.StackExchange.Redis.AspireRedisClientBuilder.HostBuilder
member.summary: Gets the with which services are being registered.

member.name: P:Aspire.StackExchange.Redis.AspireRedisClientBuilder.Settings
member.summary: Gets the used to configure the Redis client.

member.name: P:Aspire.StackExchange.Redis.AspireRedisClientBuilder.ServiceKey
member.summary: Gets the service key used to register the service, if any.

member.name: T:Aspire.StackExchange.Redis.StackExchangeRedisSettings
member.summary: Provides the client configuration settings for connecting to a Redis server.

member.name: P:Aspire.StackExchange.Redis.StackExchangeRedisSettings.ConnectionString
member.summary: Gets or sets the comma-delimited configuration string used to connect to the Redis server.

member.name: P:Aspire.StackExchange.Redis.StackExchangeRedisSettings.DisableHealthChecks
member.summary: Gets or sets a boolean value that indicates whether the Redis health check is disabled or not.

member.name: P:Aspire.StackExchange.Redis.StackExchangeRedisSettings.DisableTracing
member.summary: Gets or sets a boolean value that indicates whether the OpenTelemetry tracing is disabled or not.

member.name: P:Aspire.StackExchange.Redis.StackExchangeRedisSettings.DisableAutoActivation
member.summary: Gets or sets a boolean value that indicates whether auto activation is disabled or not.
member.remarks: When auto activation is enabled, the Redis connection is established at startup time rather than on first use, which prevents blocking threads when the connection is first requested from the DI container.

member.name: M:Aspire.HealthChecksExtensions.TryAddHealthCheck(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.HealthChecks.HealthCheckRegistration)
member.summary: Adds a HealthCheckRegistration if one hasn't already been added to the builder.

member.name: M:Aspire.HealthChecksExtensions.TryAddHealthCheck(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,System.String,System.Action{Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IHealthChecksBuilder})
member.summary: Invokes the action if the given hasn't already been added to the builder.

member.name: T:Aspire.ConfigurationSchemaAttribute
member.summary: Attribute used to automatically generate a JSON schema for a component's configuration.

member.name: P:Aspire.ConfigurationSchemaAttribute.Path
member.summary: The path corresponding to which config section binds to.

member.name: P:Aspire.ConfigurationSchemaAttribute.Type
member.summary: The type that is bound to the configuration. This type will be walked and generate a JSON schema for all the properties.

member.name: P:Aspire.ConfigurationSchemaAttribute.ExclusionPaths
member.summary: (optional) The config sections to exclude from the ConfigurationSchema. This is useful if there are properties you don't want to publicize in the config schema.

member.name: T:Aspire.LoggingCategoriesAttribute
member.summary: Provides information to describe the logging categories produced by a component.

member.name: P:Aspire.LoggingCategoriesAttribute.Categories
member.summary: The list of log categories produced by the component. These categories will show up under the Logging:LogLevel section in appsettings.json.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.AspireRedisExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for registering Redis-related services in an .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.AspireRedisExtensions.AddRedisClient(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,System.String,System.Action{Aspire.StackExchange.Redis.StackExchangeRedisSettings},System.Action{StackExchange.Redis.ConfigurationOptions})
member.summary: Registers as a singleton in the services provided by the . Enables retries, corresponding health check, logging, and telemetry.
member.param: The to read config from and add services to.
A name used to retrieve the connection string from the ConnectionStrings configuration section.
An optional method that can be used for customizing the . It's invoked after the settings are read from the configuration.
An optional method that can be used for customizing the . It's invoked after the options are read from the configuration.

member.param: The to read config from and add services to.

An optional method that can be used for customizing the . It's invoked after the settings are read from the configuration.
An optional method that can be used for customizing the . It's invoked after the options are read from the configuration.

member.summary: Registers as a keyed singleton for the given in the services provided by the . Enables retries, corresponding health check, logging, and telemetry.
member.param: The to read config from and add services to.
The name of the component, which is used as the of the service and also to retrieve the connection string from the ConnectionStrings configuration section.
An optional method that can be used for customizing the . It's invoked after the settings are read from the configuration.
An optional method that can be used for customizing the . It's invoked after the options are read from the configuration.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.AspireRedisExtensions.AddKeyedRedisClientBuilder(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,System.String,System.Action{Aspire.StackExchange.Redis.StackExchangeRedisSettings},System.Action{StackExchange.Redis.ConfigurationOptions})
member.summary: Registers as a keyed singleton for the given in the services provided by the . Enables retries, corresponding health check, logging, and telemetry.
member.param: The to read config from and add services to.
The name of the component, which is used as the of the service and also to retrieve the connection string from the ConnectionStrings configuration section.
An optional method that can be used for customizing the . It's invoked after the settings are read from the configuration.
An optional method that can be used for customizing the . It's invoked after the options are read from the configuration.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.AspireRedisExtensions.RedisSettingsAdapterService
member.summary: Used to pass StackExchangeRedisSettings instances to the ConfigurationOptionsFactory.
member.remarks: Not using StackExchangeRedisSettings itself because it is a public type that someone else could register in DI.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.AspireRedisExtensions.ConfigurationOptionsFactory
member.summary: ConfigurationOptionsFactory parses a ConfigurationOptions options object from Configuration.
member.remarks:
Using an OptionsFactory to create the object allows parsing the ConfigurationOptions IOptions object from a connection string. ConfigurationOptions.Parse(string) returns the ConfigurationOptions and doesn't support parsing to an existing object. Using a normal Configure callback isn't feasible since that only works with an existing object. Using an OptionsFactory allows us to create the initial object ourselves.
This still allows for others to Configure/PostConfigure/Validate the ConfigurationOptions since it just overrides .

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.AspireRedisExtensions.AspireDefaultOptionsProvider
member.summary: A Redis DefaultOptionsProvider for Aspire specific defaults.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Binder.SourceGeneration.BindingExtensions.Bind_StackExchangeRedisSettings(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.Object)
member.summary: Attempts to bind the given object instance to configuration values by matching property names against configuration keys recursively.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Binder.SourceGeneration.BindingExtensions.Bind_ConfigurationOptions(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.Object)
member.summary: Attempts to bind the given object instance to configuration values by matching property names against configuration keys recursively.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Binder.SourceGeneration.BindingExtensions.ValidateConfigurationKeys(System.Type,System.Lazy{System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String}},Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.BinderOptions)
member.summary: If required by the binder options, validates that there are no unknown keys in the input configuration object.

member.summary: Creates getter for a field defined in private or internal type represented with classType variable.

member.name: T:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.StackExchangeRedis.StackExchangeRedisConnectionInstrumentation
member.summary: StackExchange.Redis instrumentation.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: to instrument.
Optional name for the connection.
Configuration options for redis instrumentation.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.StackExchangeRedis.StackExchangeRedisConnectionInstrumentation.GetProfilerSessionsFactory
member.summary: Returns session for the Redis calls recording.
member.returns: Session associated with the current span context to record Redis calls.

member.name: T:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.StackExchangeRedis.StackExchangeRedisInstrumentation
member.summary: StackExchange.Redis instrumentation.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.StackExchangeRedis.StackExchangeRedisInstrumentation.AddConnection(StackExchange.Redis.IConnectionMultiplexer)
member.summary: Adds an to the instrumentation.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.StackExchangeRedis.StackExchangeRedisInstrumentation.AddConnection(System.String,StackExchange.Redis.IConnectionMultiplexer)
member.summary: Adds an to the instrumentation.
member.param: Name to use when retrieving options.

member.name: T:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.StackExchangeRedis.StackExchangeRedisInstrumentationOptions
member.summary: Options for StackExchange.Redis instrumentation.

member.name: P:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.StackExchangeRedis.StackExchangeRedisInstrumentationOptions.FlushInterval
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum time that should elapse between flushing the internal buffer of Redis profiling sessions and creating objects. Default value: 00:00:10.

member.name: P:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.StackExchangeRedis.StackExchangeRedisInstrumentationOptions.SetVerboseDatabaseStatements
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether or not the should use reflection to get more detailed tag values. Default value: False.

member.name: P:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.StackExchangeRedis.StackExchangeRedisInstrumentationOptions.Enrich
member.summary: Gets or sets an action to enrich an Activity.

remarks.para: : the profiled redis command from which additional information can be extracted to enrich the activity.

member.name: P:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.StackExchangeRedis.StackExchangeRedisInstrumentationOptions.EnrichActivityWithTimingEvents
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether or not the should enrich Activity with entries about the Redis command processing/lifetime. Defaults to true.

member.name: T:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.PropertyFetcher`1
member.summary: PropertyFetcher fetches a property from an object.
member.typeparam: The type of the property being fetched.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.PropertyFetcher`1.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Property name to fetch.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.PropertyFetcher`1.TryFetch(System.Object,`0@)
member.summary: Try to fetch the property from the object.
member.param: Object to be fetched.
Fetched value.

member.name: T:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard
member.summary: Methods for guarding against exception throwing values.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfNull(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is null.
member.param: The value to check.
The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfNullOrEmpty(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is null or empty.
member.param: The value to check.
The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfNullOrWhitespace(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is null or whitespace.
member.param: The value to check.
The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfZero(System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is zero.
member.param: The value to check.
The message to use in the thrown exception.
The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfInvalidTimeout(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is not considered a valid timeout.
member.param: The value to check.
The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfOutOfRange(System.Int32,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is not within the given range.
member.param: The value to check.
The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.
The inclusive lower bound.
The inclusive upper bound.
The name of the lower bound.
The name of the upper bound.
An optional custom message to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfOutOfRange(System.Double,System.String,System.Double,System.Double,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is not within the given range.
member.param: The value to check.
The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.
The inclusive lower bound.
The inclusive upper bound.
The name of the lower bound.
The name of the upper bound.
An optional custom message to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfNotOfType``1(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is not of the expected type.
member.param: The value to check.
The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.
member.typeparam: The type attempted to convert to.
member.returns: The value casted to the specified type.

member.summary: Constants for semantic attribute names outlined by the OpenTelemetry specifications. .
